title: rubus hanceanus
intro: Rubus hanceanus, also known as the Taiwanese raspberry or Hance's raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to Taiwan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus hanceanus include its potential to reduce blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Rubus hanceanus can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
